Vishal Jha

MSCS @ NYU | Quantitative Developer

Graduate student in Computer Science at NYU Tandon, specializing in high-performance systems and machine learning infrastructure. Experienced in building scalable financial technology and low-latency trading engines. Passionate about distributed systems, market microstructure, and probabilistic algorithms.

Featured Projects

View All →

High-Frequency Trading Engine

Engineered a high-performance, low-latency trading engine in C++ featuring a price-time priority order matching algorithm and a custom FIX-like messaging protocol.

C++Low-Latency SystemsQuant
GitHub

CLibML (C Machine Learning Framework)

Building a lightweight machine learning framework in C with core components for tensors, memory management (arena-style allocation), and model training primitives.

CSystems ProgrammingMLMemory Management
GitHub

Real-Time Posture Analysis

Developed a browser-based application using Mediapipe to perform real-time human pose estimation for tracking and correcting exercise forms.

May 2025 – Jul 2025

Senior Analyst @ Standard Chartered GBS

  • Fortified application security by integrating HashiCorp Vault for secrets management and remediating OWASP vulnerabilities.

Jul 2023 – Apr 2025

Development Engineer @ Standard Chartered GBS

  • Engineered a scalable, high-throughput RESTful API framework using Spring Boot to facilitate real-time customer onboarding across diverse international markets.
  • Architected a modular system with reusable Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) to parse and map dynamic JSON responses, enhancing code maintainability.
  • Implemented idempotent API endpoints and robust custom exception handling, increasing system reliability and ensuring data consistency in distributed transactions.
Spring Boot • Java • RESTful API • Distributed Transactions
